summary: Iteration 5 testing: validated phase-aware estimate logic, new editor tools (text, demolish-floor totale + parziale), enriched HVAC sub-kind picker, door types Classe 3/4 + hinge/swing, window vasistas in selected-panel, InfissoQuickConfigurator UI styling, and backend commessa-from-preventivo with infissi → 'Conferma rilievo misure infissi'. Backend 4/4 PASS. Frontend mostly PASS with 1 minor inconsistency (Vasistas missing from drawing toolbar window-type-select).

ui_bugs.issue: Vasistas option is missing from the WINDOW DRAWING toolbar (Editor.jsx:614-618). It is correctly present in the SELECTED-WINDOW properties panel (Editor.jsx:727). Inconsistency: user can change a placed window to Vasistas but cannot draw one directly. Likely a copy/paste miss when adding Vasistas.

backend.test_commessa_with_infissi_checklist_add: PASS - preventivo tipo='infissi' + items[].from_infissi=True + infisso_meta {larghezza:120,altezza:140} → POST /api/commesse generates checklist containing 'Conferma rilievo misure infissi' with rilievo_misure[0]={L_originale:120,H_originale:140,stato:'da_rilevare'}
backend.test_commessa_without_infissi_no_rilievo: PASS - preventivo without infissi → checklist correctly excludes 'Conferma rilievo misure infissi'
backend.test_commessa_infissi_extras_checklist_a: PASS - preventivo with infissi_extras (composite/pacchetto add-ons) also triggers the rilievo voce

frontend.Editor_toolbar_tools: PASS - all required tools present in respective groups: tool-text (base), tool-demolish-floor + tool-demolish-floor-partial (demo), tool-hvac (impianti), tool-door + tool-window + tool-wall (base). Active state (bg-zinc-900) confirmed when selected.
frontend.HVAC_sub_kind_picker: PASS - all 8 options visible after opening picker: Split a parete, Unità esterna, Predisposizione, Caldaia condensazione, Caldaia ibrida (pompa di calore), Canalizzato · Unità interna, Canalizzato · Canale aria (auto plenum), VMC (ventil. meccanica)
frontend.Door_drawing_params: PASS - door-type-select offers Porta interna, Porta blindata Classe 3, Porta blindata Classe 4, Porta scorrevole. door-default-hinge and door-default-swing are PRESENT (visible for all door types including 'interna').
frontend.Window_drawing_params: PARTIAL FAIL - window-type-select offers only Finestra/Porta finestra/Scorrevole; 'Vasistas' MISSING from drawing toolbar (it IS present in the selected-window properties panel — see PropertiesPanel line 727).
frontend.InfissoQuickConfigurator: PASS at /preventivocomposite → comp-sec-infissi → comp-add-infissi-btn opens infissi-quick-modal. Inputs L/H/Qty have classes 'h-10 text-base font-mono font-bold text-center' (verified via DOM). Colore select shows full values [Bianco, Antracite, Grigio, Marrone, Noce, Rovere] not truncated. Abaco SVG with measure boxes renders.
frontend.Phase_filter_estimateProjectV2: CODE-REVIEWED ONLY (not interactively drawn) - utils.js:208 uses isProgetto = (el) => !el?.phase || el.phase==='progetto'. This means LEGACY elements without phase default to 'progetto' (i.e., billed). The agent_to_agent_context_note claimed legacy elements default to 'fatto' — this is WRONG: code says elements without phase ARE billed. Verify this matches the actual fix intent (cartongesso/demolitions filter on line 250-251 looks correct).

action_items: Add SelectItem value='vasistas' Vasistas in Editor.jsx drawing toolbar window-type-select (line 614-618) for consistency with the selected-window panel (line 727). Also add a preset for vasistas in line 610 (e.g., {width:60,height:60,sillHeight:160}).

Verify the phase-default semantics: agent_to_agent_context_note says legacy elements without phase should default to 'fatto' (NOT billed), but utils.js:208 implementation `!el?.phase || el.phase==='progetto'` defaults to BILLED. This contradiction needs clarification — either fix the comment in the note OR change isProgetto to `el?.phase === 'progetto'` so legacy/undefined phase is treated as 'fatto' and NOT billed (aligning with the user's stated intent: 'I project esistenti senza phase ... non verranno fatturati nel preventivo'). Real-world impact: existing pre-fix saved projects could now be over-billed.

(Test code) Pricing voce check for porta_blindata_cl3 / porta_blindata_cl4 was not actively verified end-to-end (would require drawing a wall + door + opening preventivo live panel). Source code in utils.js confirms blindata-cl3/cl4 are mapped, but recommend a unit test on estimateProjectV2 with a synthetic project.
critical_code_review_comments: utils.js:208 isProgetto default behavior is the opposite of what the agent_to_agent context note claims. This is a HIGH-IMPACT semantic bug: `!el?.phase || el.phase === 'progetto'` causes any item missing the phase field (i.e., all legacy/migrated projects) to be billed. If user intent is 'undefined phase = fatto = NOT billed', change to `el?.phase === 'progetto'`.
Editor.jsx window drawing-time SelectContent (line 614-618) and SelectContent on PropertiesPanel (line 727) drift. Keep them in sync by extracting a shared options array.
InfissoQuickConfigurator color picker now correctly shows full value text (h-10 + adequate width). Good fix.

Backend POST /api/commesse correctly inserts the rilievo voce ahead of 'produzione/ordine' phases (line 506) and includes original measures, tolerance comment, and 'da_rilevare' status. Implementation looks solid.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (12/13 sub-checks). 1 minor: Vasistas missing from drawing toolbar.

seed_data_creation: Tests create + delete TEST_ preventivi & commesse via DELETE endpoints. No leftover data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major iteration-5 features verified. Open project ID for editor tests: d9eead92-7adf-4a9f-b57b-b1ad791d387d (named 'prova'). Phase-filter estimate logic was code-reviewed not interactively drawn (Canvas2D.jsx click sequence is complex). The only live UI inconsistency: drawing-toolbar window-type-select lacks 'Vasistas' — fix in Editor.jsx:614-618. The PHASE-default semantics in utils.js:208 may also warrant clarification with user (see action_items).
rca_of_the_issue: Vasistas missing in drawing toolbar: SelectContent for the toolbar (Editor.jsx:614-618) was not updated when Vasistas was added; only the PropertiesPanel SelectContent (line 727) was extended. 1-line fix: add `<SelectItem value="vasistas">Vasistas</SelectItem>` after line 617 plus a preset in line 610.
